planScore.label: Partly on plan
reasons: Lost with a clock that never got going.

lossCondition.primary: Too much control, not enough questing
evidence: Removed 6 bodies but only reached 6 lore — winning combat, not the race.
Opponent's lore clock (10 by their turn 14) beat yours while you traded.

keyTurningPoints.label: First quest
keyTurningPoints.evidence: Your first quest landed on turn 4 (your turn 2).

coach.headline: Loss via Too much control, not enough questing
coach.summary: You lost to Steel/Ruby (avg cost 2.72, midrange) at 6-17. Removed 6 bodies but only reached 6 lore — winning combat, not the race. Clock: you hit 10 lore never, they hit 10 on turn 14.
whatWorked: Still removed 6 opposing bodies before losing.
whatFailed: Removed 6 bodies but only reached 6 lore — winning combat, not the race.
Opponent's lore clock (10 by their turn 14) beat yours while you traded.
nextGameFocus: Once the board is safe, redirect removal-holding characters into questing.
coach.mulliganAdvice: Mulligan count looked reasonable for this game.
coach.matchupAdvice: Steel/Ruby read as a midrange curve — win the tempo exchanges and make sure your own lore clock keeps ticking through the trades.
